title: witherzilla
body:
Witherzilla

This universe is flawed, Notch. They have disrupted the universe and the balance must be restored.

Edit and combine the table
This universe is flawed, Notch. They have disrupted the universe and the balance must be restored.

- The Demon Sla has just possessed a player from the main world

Health points for regular difficulty: 10 million (× 5,000,000)
Nightmare Mode 20 million (× 10,000,000)
Base damage of full difficulty: 1.7976931348623157×10^308 (× 8.9884656743115785×10^307)
Skill damage
Meta-observation, Close Combat (1.7976931348623157×10^308 (× 8.9884656743115785×10^307))

A large number of Demon heads (21+ (× 10.5+)), giant Demon heads (added in future versions)

Primordial Lightning (49 (× 24.5) armor-piercing damage +100 (× 50) Fire damage)

Targeted blasting, item deletion, code attack

Armor value: 24 (× 12)
Aggressive behavior type
"Identity God"
Summoned items enhance the spirit of the deceased
NoClip	true
The recovery rate is approximately 100-400HP per tick (× 50 - × 200±).
Generated in the void land
Dropped objects
Creation Blade (× Number of players in the game), Random Items (×256, excluding Creation Blade), Random Blocks (×256)

Coal block (×1024), iron block (×512), gold block (×512), diamond block (×256), emerald block (×256)

Dragon Egg (×256), Fine Crystal Block (×128), Void Block (×128), Compressed Bedrock (×128)

Experience value 8,000,000 (XP bomb) (125,000,000 before version 0.49)
Achievement
He is free! (Kill Godzilla in the Void Land), at the end of the road (Kill Godzilla again)

The Eternal Meeting (The Meeting between the Demon Sla and the Dragon of Execution)

Namespace ID WitherBossTitan
Author's Profile:

It is not a Titan creature but a god. It is the biggest BOSS in this mod. It has the largest size, the most health and armor points, as well as nearly unlimited attack power. It can summon the spirit to assist itself and thereby attract the enemy's attack. It cannot be generated naturally. It will be waiting for you in the Void Land. It is the true ultimate BOSS of Minecraft.

Godzilla (some who survived the Catacomb know its real name is Regnator) is the strongest "Titan" in the history of Minecraft. Its power is so unfathomable that other Titans are afraid of it. It is the most powerful creature in Minecraft, surpassing both the player and the game itself. Its strength is second only to the God Notch. It is also the God of balance and the true owner of the Blade of Creation.

The Demon Slara is one of the two ultimate bosses in this mod (the other being the Dragon of Execution), and it only generates in the Void Land.

Its appearance is like an ordinary spirit magnified dozens of times, with a height of 224 grids and a width of 64 grids. It has a "fluorite lamp" shining with neon light on its head and emits a white particle effect similar to the Blade of Creation all over its body. When the health is less than half, a special "Spirit Armor" will be worn. Its height increases to 448 bars, its width to 128 bars, and its volume becomes eight times the original. The attack and defense power are enhanced. The Spirit Armor is a bright blue body with black stripes.

Godzilla is the great god of balance. It can turn everything to ashes. The Godzilla cannot be truly eliminated. Even the Titans, whose status is second only to it, cannot understand its power. Never has a Titan dared to threaten the Phantom Slava.

It is worth noting that the Demoness may be destructive, but the natural forces it represents and controls in the all-powerful universe are not malicious, and thus it is not. Unlike other Titans, it doesn't like or enjoy what it does. It destroys everything because it discovers the imbalance in the universe and compensates by creating 50 50. The Demon Sla is extremely intelligent. It lives and fights for the infinite. It is like a god of infinite power.

Background:

Godzilla is the second entity created in the All-powerful universe. It was ordered to maintain the balance of the entire all-powerful universe, but this would eventually drive the evil spirit Ezra crazy. After that, it attempted to destroy the all-powerful universe and believed that the entire world was "unbalanced". Notch engaged in a long battle with Godzilla, which eventually ended with Godzilla being sealed into the Void Land. From now on, the Demoness has been WAITING for other entities to enter this realm and help it to be liberated from the Void Land......

Executor Dragon

Congratulations on coming here, player. You simply can't understand how slim your chances of winning are. Now, try to guess the chance that you will defeat me...

Introduction:

The Dragon of Execution (real name - Clarigatio) is the second God-level Titan. It is also one of the two ultimate bosses in this mod (the other being the Demon Slara), and it will appear in the Nameless Land.

The dragon of execution creates possibilities and randomness, which some people also call chaos and coordination. Not a single Titan can leave its territory alive because their survival rate is 0%. The Dragon of Execution possesses?? The amount of health and destructive power. The power of the Dragon of Execution is second only to Notch and is the same as that of Godzilla. After the player defeats the Execution Dragon, it will drop the Perfect Axe. The Dragon of Execution will be more threatening than the Demon Slilla (1.12.2).

Player, this game is far from over.

The Dragon of Execution has arrived in the main world

If you think this battle is as hard as Godzilla, you are wrong. I advise you to be fully prepared, because this battle will be even harder, ready to face death......

Other

Powerful creature，add some powerful mob
The Demon Slilla, a replica of the old version 1.7.10, has 10,000,000 health points and will automatically attack nearby creatures. If the player is in survival mode and has items from other MODs in hand, it will also attack the player
It replicates items such as the Execution Dragon, Creation Blade, and Perfect Axe from the old version 1.7.10
It also has cool special effects
强大的生物
复刻了1.7.10旧版本的凋灵斯拉，拥有10000000血量，会自动攻击附近的生物，如果玩家是生存模式而且手中有其他mod的物品也会攻击玩家
复刻了1.7.10旧版本执行之龙，创世之刃，完美之斧等物品
还拥有炫酷的特效
